productDisplayName: Rockport Men D2N Desert Boot Dark Brown Shoe
description: Get ready to get some serious attention with these Day to Night Desert boots from rockport. Designed for continuous wear and superior walking comfort, these shoes are a great blend of form and function. Team these with chinos and polo neck tees for casual Fridays or for weekend getaways.Upper Full grain leather uppers for greater support and stability Nappa leather lining for superior comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Moulded footbed for snug fit Heel cup for sturdy support adidas adiPRENE® footbed is highly shock-absorbent and protects the heel at impact Midsole Polyurethane (PU) Midsole Offers durability for long-term wear & shock absorbent-cushioning to help reduce foot fatigue Leather Midsole Outsole adidas adiPRENE® footbed gives superior cushioning and shock absorption to the heel on impact Rubber outsole provides a durable grip on a variety of surfaces Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
